name: Septic Savages
short_description: After encountering an alien creature in a bathroom stall, one man is propelled into a never-ending quest of sewer dwelling carnage! Septic Savages is a 2D, 1 or 2-player, twin-stick shooting roguelike with loads of randomized elements and hours upon hours of gameplay.
detailed_description:
Play the Free Demo in your Browser


Please follow this link to try Septic Savages right now in your browser:

The demo includes 12 levels or arcade mode along with 2 boss battles and 2 tiers of in-game powerups. Please note that the demo does not offer 2-player support.


About the Game

After encountering an alien creature in a bathroom stall, one man is propelled into a never-ending quest of sewer dwelling carnage! Septic Savages is a 2D, 1 or 2-player, twin-stick shooting roguelike with loads of randomized elements and hours upon hours of gameplay.

Thanks to the power of HTML5 and Construct 2 you can try a demo of Septic Savages right now in your browser! Please see the above announcements to give the game a whirl and decide whether or nor it's for you.

Game Features


  • 4,320 different powerup combinations!
  • 27 possible difficulty settings, from simple fun to insane brutality!
  • 2 modes of play: an 8 level campaign and endless arcade mode!
  • Play alone or with a friend! Local co-op support for both modes of play.
  • Complete controller support!
  • Bosses, potions, enemies, biomes, random environments, catchy tunes, and more!
